title: Bump Tactus to v0.46.0 and regenerate lock for Python 3.11

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting work: will update tactus dependency to v0.46.0 in pyproject.toml and regenerate poetry.lock using Python 3.11 to match production.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Updated pyproject.toml: tactus constraint changed from ^0.45.2 to ^0.46.0. Next step: regenerate poetry.lock with Python 3.11.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Lock attempt failed: tactus 0.46.0 requires lupa >=2.7, but project pinned lupa=2.6. Applying minimal compatible update to lupa=2.7 and re-locking.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: poetry lock succeeded after updating lupa to 2.7 for compatibility with tactus 0.46.0. Verifying lock contents and preparing completion summary.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementation complete in working tree: updated pyproject to tactus ^0.46.0 and lupa 2.7 (required by tactus), regenerated poetry.lock with Poetry 2.3.2 on Python 3.11, and verified with poetry check (warnings only about deprecated poetry metadata fields). Leaving task in_progress until changes are landed.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: User requested release-path promotion. Opened PR from develop to main for merged Tactus update work; will share URL once created.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: PR opened: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/167 (develop -> main), title: chore: promote develop to main.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting follow-up repair: create fix branch from develop and resolve current failing checks on PR #167 (develop -> main) introduced by recent develop commits.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Opened develop repair PR for CI regressions affecting reviewability of PR #167: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/168.
